title: Administrative procedure
doc_html:
§84. Administrative procedure

           The commission's hearings, practice and procedure and rule and regulation making procedure are as provided in the Administrative Procedure Act, R.S. 49:950 et seq., except as otherwise provided in this Chapter.

           Acts 1974, No. 553, §1.
doc_text:
§84.  Administrative procedure
The commission's hearings, practice and procedure and rule and
regulation making procedure are as provided in the Administrative Procedure
Act, R.S. 49:950 et seq., except as otherwise provided in this Chapter.
Acts 1974, No. 553, §1.
